image_dependency: question asks about the shaded fraction of a square, which depends on visual geometry not described in text
multi_step: solving likely requires identifying the relevant shaded region in the figure and mapping it to a fraction of the whole square
multiple-choice format with 5 fraction options suggests comparative geometric reasoning rather than pure lookup
metadata.multi_solution_policy.should_push_multi_solution_agent=true indicates upstream expectation of some multi-solution potential
verifiability: answer_type=short_text with a specific fractional target
choices provide a finite set of candidate fractions including the labeled correct answer
